query: ok I'm in TurboTax and it's asking me for my capital loss carryover from last year. I have my 2024 return PDF somewhere in this folder. Can you pull the exact numbers from Form 1040 line 15 and Schedule D lines 7, 15, and 21 and show me screenshots so I know I'm entering the right thing?
verify the indemnification cap is $2M and the notice period is 60 days in the signed MSA — I need to see the actual text from the contract before I send this to legal
something doesn't add up on this vendor invoice. the PO says $14,500 but I think the invoice total is different. can you check both PDFs and show me proof of what each one actually says?
I just got my W-2 and 1099 from Schwab. Before I file, double-check that the federal wages on the W-2 and the dividends total on the 1099 match what I wrote down. Screenshot proof please
where does the $47,000 deductible come from in this insurance policy? show me exactly where it says that in the PDF
I scanned a bunch of old receipts and need to find the one that has a $312.50 total — it's for an expense report and I need a screenshot showing the amount
my accountant sent me a PDF of my return but I want to confirm the numbers match what she told me on the phone. the AGI should be $189,450 and total tax $31,200. can you show me where those appear?
we're doing an audit and I need to trace each line item back to its source document. here are 3 invoices — can you create a proof page showing where each amount comes from?
the grant agreement says the funding cap is $750,000 but the budget spreadsheet shows $800,000. can you pull screenshots from the PDF agreement proving what the actual cap is?
confirm these stats from the methodology section match what's reported in the results: n=1,247, p<0.001, effect size d=0.45. show me both places in the PDF
can you read this PDF and give me a summary of what it says? it's a contract for a new vendor
I need to merge these 3 PDFs into a single file — the tax return, the W-2, and the 1099
extract all the text from this invoice PDF into a spreadsheet with columns for item, quantity, and price
fill in this PDF form with my name and address — it's a rental application
create a PDF report from this data showing monthly revenue trends with charts
can you convert this Word doc to PDF format?
help me calculate my estimated taxes for Q2 based on my YTD income
split this 50-page PDF into individual chapter files based on the bookmarks
make a nice-looking invoice PDF for my freelance work — $3,500 for web design services to Acme Corp
I have a spreadsheet of expenses and I need to match each row to the right receipt PDF. can you organize them into folders?
